name: EGB OE TL.Z./DT POST
summary: Deutsche Post AG, operating as DHL Group, is a German multinational package delivery and supply chain management company headquartered in Bonn. It is one of the world's largest logistics companies, providing services such as mail delivery, express delivery, freight transport, and supply chain solutions. DHL Group operates through various divisions, including Post & Parcel Germany, Express, Global Forwarding, Freight, Supply Chain, and eCommerce Solutions.
